message: sub:film_artifacts/light_leak — anti_aesthetic — color casts, lens flare, expired film color shifts

response.objective_caption: Diagonal fields of saturated yellow-orange, red, pink, and deep blue-black fill the frame, blending into one another with gentle tonal transitions and containing no identifiable objects, figures, or environmental context.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph employing extreme intentional blur, presenting diagonal fields of saturated yellow-orange, red, pink, and deep blue-black that fill the frame and blend into one another with gentle tonal transitions, completely dissolving all recognizable subject matter, surface detail, and environmental context into pure gestural color.
